column.text:
• Los Angeles Angels placed right-handed pitcher Jack Kochanowicz on the 15-day injured list with right elbow inflammation.
• Texas Rangers released outfielder Sam Haggerty.
• Los Angeles Dodgers traded left-handed pitcher Antoine Kelly to the Chicago Cubs.
• Texas Rangers traded shortstop Richie Martin Jr. to the Colorado Rockies.
• Arizona Diamondbacks signed free agent outfielder Max Kepler.
• Los Angeles Angels recalled left-handed pitcher Sam Aldegheri from Triple-A Salt Lake.
• Detroit Tigers sent left-handed pitcher Tarik Skubal on a rehab assignment to High-A West Michigan.
• Seattle Mariners sent catcher Cal Raleigh on a rehab assignment to High-A Everett.
• Cincinnati Reds activated right-handed pitcher Rhett Lowder from the 15-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
